name: Asian Sesame Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Asian egg noodles or spaghetti noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the noodles according to package instructions. Rinse and drain well. Place the noodles in a large bowl and set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the vegetable (or peanut) oil, soy sauce, sesame oil, crushed garlic, and red pepper flakes. Pour this mixture over the noodles and toss well with your hands to coat evenly.
3. Toast the sesame seeds in a dry skillet until fragrant, then let cool slightly. Sprinkle the toasted sesame seeds on top of the noodles before serving.
